message:
test: add regression tests for legacy JSONL mailbox fixes (gt-uglmm)

- Corruption detection: verify listLegacy and ListArchived return
  errors with file path and line number for malformed JSONL lines
- Concurrent access: verify 10 concurrent MarkRead operations all
  succeed under flock (no lost updates)
- Atomic archive: verify Archive moves message from inbox to archive
  correctly under a single lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
